artists.name: Ghetto Justice
artists.description: GHETTO JUSTICE has been around for a good ten years now, so it’s time to invite them to Dinkelsbühl. With the motto “More mosh, more love, more good vibes, because anyone can glare, preach dogma, and nod along collectively,” the Berliners are heading south to us in August to blow your ears away with their hardcore sound. Be there when the party starts!

artists.name: Die Habenichtse
artists.description: For the first time, we welcome the up-and-coming German folk rock band DIE HABENICHTSE. The “folk rock theater troupe”—as they describe themselves—will celebrate their premiere on the Camspite Circus stage and will definitely get you dancing and sweating. And it wouldn’t be the first band of this kind to lay the foundation for a meteoric career at BREEZE. We can’t wait!

artists.name: Motorjesus
artists.description: Fast forward, hard rocking rock from Mönchengladbach is on the menu today: MOTORJESUS are coming to pull your ears out. If you like down-to-earth, sweaty rock ‘n’ roll shows, you can hardly get past MOTORJESUS. The guys play honest-to-goodness hard rock that goes straight to the gut. Live this music unfolds its power especially, so also with MOTORJESUS, who know to kiss asses on stage. So if you like old-school entertainment, you should make a note of MOTORJESUS on your personal running order.

artists.name: Hackneyed
artists.description: Exactly ten years after their breakup, they are back for two handful of shows: HACKNEYED! A little older (and some of them a little balder and fatter ^^) but motivated to the tips of their toes, the guys from Aalen will show you on Tuesday that songs like ’Gut Candy’ and ’The Flaw Of Flesh’ have easily stood the test of time and that the (old) gentlemen will still be just as powerful in 2026 as they ever were. Don’t miss this show—as I said, one of very few—and celebrate HACKNEYED and their musical legacy with us!

artists.name: Excrementory Grindfuckers
artists.description: Fancy Schlager grindcore with lots of humor and a crazy show? Okay, your wish is our command: welcome EXCREMENTORY GRINDFUCKERS! They’ve already played a few successful shows at SUMMER BREEZE, but it’s been a while since they played, so it was time to invite the fun grinders back. So lace up your dancing shoes and oil up your throats, because the EXCREMENTORY GRINDFUCKERS will once again pull off a mega-fest in Dinkelsbühl, that’s for sure!

artists.name: Betontod
artists.description: It’s been no less than nine years since BETONTOD were last our guests… 2026 it’s finally time again, the anti-rock stars are dying to belt out their German rock songs. Get ready for a big party with big, bawling anthems and a sweaty show. In August 2026 in Dinkelsbühl…

artists.name: Airbourne
artists.description: AIRBOURNE will take to the big stage in Dinkelsbühl in August! The pure enthusiasm that the Australians generate can be seen, for example, on one of their fan sites: “AIRBOURNE are the walking, talking, living, breathing, screaming, spitting embodiment of everything that hard rock has been since its inception. Having fun, tearing it up, partying hard, and filled with melodic danger and grinning optimism, AIRBOURNE forge underdog anthems with almost reckless devotion.” We’ll just leave it at that! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6w

artists.name: In Flames
artists.description: Introducing you to this band would be as ignorant as bringing your own beer to a pub. Of course, you all know and love the Swedes who will hit SUMMER BREEZE 2026: IN FLAMES! Anders and Co. have been playing their way into your hearts for a long time now, and after their last triumphant visit to Dinkelsbühl, we did not have to think twice and booked IN FLAMES for 2026. It appears that there is a special bond between you and the band and with each additional appearance of IN FLAMES at SUMMER BREEZE this bond seems to grow stronger, the shows more intense, and the parties harder – just as it should be. You will carry the band on your hands, and IN FLAMES will repay you with a massive show and plenty of incredible hits. 100 percent! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6e

artists.name: Hatebreed
artists.description: On stage, the Americans have ALWAYS been a mind-blowing act which is why they are relentlessly celebrated – and justifiably so. No matter how many times you have seen HATEBREED, you will always have a hard time standing still when they enter the stage. And once again, Jamey and the boys will pull out all the stops and make this open-air show to something special. Jamey and his bunch of rascals are looking forward to you – hopefully, you do the same!

artists.name: Alcest
artists.description: Eight years have passed since the band’s last appearance in Dinkelbühl. So it’s time to bring ALCEST back to SUMMER BREEZE. And the French will enchant all dark souls in Dinkelsbühl with their epic post black metal / shoegaze. ALCEST have developed immensely since their last show with us, so look forward to their show in August 2026!

artists.name: Blasmusik Illenschwang
artists.description: Once again, SUMMER BREEZE will be opened with a big fanfare, because, before you enter a four-day parallel metal universe, it is time for the popular BLASMUSIK ILLENSCHWANG. Every year, the masses who gather for the marching band’s show prove that the band not only spreads local colour, but for many of you has become an important part of the festival. Which is a good thing, as it cements the fact that BLASMUSIK ILLENSCHWANG is the only band that makes people dance (or mosh) every single year. So let’s get this party started, or – staying with the local colour – “oans, zwoa, gsuffa!” PS: NEW! BLASMUSIK is now on Facebook and Instagram! Feel free to follow and like them!

artists.name: Neckbreakker
artists.description: Old school death metal played by young guys – that’s NECKBREAKKER from Denmark. And this band has it all: since they last visited us in 2024, NECKBREAKKER have released an album, signed with Nuclear Blast, and played with big names like Slayer! Not bad for a young band with this sound! The Danes are currently working on new material, so get ready for the hot new shit from Denmark, which we will present to you at the Nuclear Blast Label Night 2026.

artists.name: The Narrator
artists.description: After their first appearance last year was a resounding success, we simply had to book THE NARRATOR from Essen again. With their sophisticated metal/hardcore sound, they are sure to hit the mark once again and rock the Nuclear Blast label night on Wednesday! The mix of heavy riffs and melodic passages will be another musical treat; get ready for a show full of adrenaline!

artists.name: Green Lung
artists.description: Recently stepping in at short notice as a replacement (thanks again!), GREEN LUNG will finally be part of the regular program in 2026. GREEN LUNG combines elements of doom and heavy metal with an atmospheric, often psychedelic touch in their music. Their songs are characterized by heavy riffs, powerful vocals, and a dark, mystical mood. In doing so, they create a unique soundscape that is both retro and modern. This went down really well with you at their last gig at DKB, so nothing should stand in the way of another successful show as part of the Nuclear Blast Label Night.

artists.name: Paradise Lost
artists.description: In the early nineties, this band raised attention with their heavy and powerful, but nonetheless melodic music that blew some fresh air into an industry that was dominated by US American and Swedish Deathmetal: PARADISE LOST. Today, over 30 years later, the Brits return to their roots which means that once more, heavy darkness, growls, dragging riffs, melodic guitars and Doom-influences dominate the program of PARADISE LOST. This is also the recipe of their latest album ‘Obsidian’ which does not only appeal to their old-school fanbase, but also convinces the newer and younger audience. In Dinkelsbühl, PARADISE LOST will pull out all the stops and perform a special setlist for you. And maybe, there will be one or two surprises, too… You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6p

artists.name: Eivør
artists.description: And now for something completely different: Immerse yourself in the fascinating Nordic soundscape of EIVØR! As part of the Nuclear Blast Label Night, this extraordinary artist will perform in Dinkelsbühl for the first time and transport you to another world with her folkloric melodies. Mystical, captivating, extraordinary—all of these words apply to EIVØR’s work. Let her and her band enchant you!

artists.name: Miracle Of Sound
artists.description: He is considered one of Ireland’s most successful indie musicians: Gavin Dunne, creative mind and leader of MIRACLE OF SOUND! Influenced by video games, TV series, and films, the band has made a name for itself primarily in the gaming scene. The songs cover a wide range of genres and styles, from dark folk to symphonic metal to sea shanties, and have attracted a broad and diverse audience over the past ten years. Now appearing at SUMMER BREEZE for the first time, let yourself be enchanted by the magic and diversity of MIRACLE OF SOUND!

artists.name: Persecutor
artists.description: Thrashers, listen up! A fantastic band from Denmark is coming to visit us: PERSECUTOR. The Danes combine classic thrash metal with tight arrangements, melodic harmonies, and varied tempos. AND: they are absolutely explosive live! Moshpits are guaranteed. Blessed with a charismatic frontman, this band will rock your world! Beware!Thrashers, listen up! A fantastic band from Denmark is coming to visit us: PERSECUTOR. The Danes combine classic thrash metal with tight arrangements, melodic harmonies, and varied tempos. AND: they are absolutely explosive live! Moshpits are guaranteed. Blessed with a charismatic frontman, this band will rock your world! Beware!

artists.name: King Nugget Gang
artists.description: Please, everyone! Please, please, don’t bring any deep fryers to BREEZE next year because of this confirmation! The KING NUGGET GANG is coming to Dinkelsbühl! In other words: August 2026 is going to be hot, greasy, and unforgettable, because when this gang takes Dinkelsbühl by storm, no one will be able to escape the greasy beats and overdose of humor! A new star in the SB sky that will shine brightly in the coming years? Very likely, because the KING NUGGET GANG has what it takes to get off to a flying start with you! PS: You are still welcome to drop off Dino Nuggets at the booking office.

artists.name: Inhuman Nature
artists.description: Fancy some awesome crossover thrash with a metallic hardcore edge? Then INHUMAN NATURE is just the thing for you! The British band rocks out on their latest album, Greater Than Death, and it’s a real joy to listen to. Impetuous, catchy, perfect for parties and mosh pits – their premiere in Dinkelsbühl is sure to be a success. Check out this awesome band, we’re really excited about them!

artists.name: Urne
artists.description: This confirmation sits musically between all chairs, and that’s what makes it so unique and exciting. We’re talking about URNE from London. Their mix of stoner, sludge, metalcore, doom, death, and grunge is outstanding—as we Swabians say, ahem. If you’re into bands that are outside the norm, you should check out URNE at Riot Of The Underground! They were one of the winning bands at BREEZE 2022, and it’s quite possible that they’ll repeat this in 2026. You don’t want to miss that, do you?!

artists.name: Castle Rat
artists.description: CASTLE RAT are a heavy doom band from Brooklyn who follow in the footsteps of Black Sabbath in the broadest sense. In 2026, they will be performing for the first time at Riot Of The Underground. With their medieval fantasy aesthetic, raw energy, and catchy melodies, the band should be an easy sell for you. Let yourself be transported to the wonderland of CASTLE RAT in Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: Cân Bardd
artists.description: Our next confirmation will send you on an emotional rollercoaster: CÂN BARDD. The Swiss band is known for celebrating atmospheric black metal that incorporates numerous folk-influenced elements. Cold and warm, harsh and super melodic, so to speak. This mixture works perfectly, as you can experience in August 2026 in Dinkelsbühl as part of the Riot Of The Undeground! Be there!

Founded in late 2022 in Djursland, Denmark, 802 are causing a stir with their unique and rousing mix of heavy metal distortion, ghostly synthesizers, and catchy hooks with progressive drumbeats. The trio’s music is bangable, danceable, and terribly catchy. The discrepancy between their typical metal look (including studs and the like) and sugar-sweet melodies combined with groovy beats immediately captivates you. Believe us, we’ve already seen the band live. Be sure to check out 802 at Riot Of The Underground—thank us later!

artists.name: Born Hanged
artists.description: If the keywords Boss-HM2, death metal, and hardcore punk warm your heart, then you should take note of BORN HANGED from Karlsruhe! Because here, the title truly says it all: ’Ultimate Savagery’ is the name of the new EP from the Baden-based band, and with their mangy bastardization of death metal and hardcore, these gentlemen have created the PERFECT soundtrack for fast-paced mosh pit action. Anyone who likes Nails and the like MUST show up at the Campsite Stage for BORN HANGED!

artists.name: Dethroned
artists.description: A very powerful band is coming to SUMMER BREEZE for the first time: DETHRONED from Dresden. The band is dedicated to an extremely effective mix of hardcore and death metal, so we are already looking forward to the numerous mosh pits during their performance! Don’t miss it, it’s going to be great!

artists.name: Backstabbed
artists.description: Powerful, diverse hardcore from southern Germany – that’s what BACKSTABBED from Offenburg stands for. In August 2026, the boys will rock Dinkelsbühl for the first time, and you can expect a sweat-inducing show that will hit you right between the eyes! Don’t miss it, because you’re officially going to get your ass kicked!Powerful, diverse hardcore from southern Germany – that’s what BACKSTABBED from Offenburg stands for. In August 2026, the boys will rock Dinkelsbühl for the first time, and you can expect a sweat-inducing show that will hit you right between the eyes! Don’t miss it, because you’re officially going to get your ass kicked!

artists.name: Ochmoneks
artists.description: Fast-paced, catchy punk – that’s what OCHMONEKS from Düsseldorf have stood for since 2015. In 2026, they’ll be getting you fired up with their hymns, and we’re expecting a proper mosh pit in front of the Campsite Circus stage! The band from Düsseldorf brings along a lot of fun and good vibes, which will hopefully rub off on you, so nothing stands in the way of a proper party!

artists.name: Waves Like Walls
artists.description: Ingolstadt represent! WAVES LIKE WALLS are coming to Franconia for the first time. This melodic hardcore band is going to turn our circus upside down, you can be sure of that! Their catchy songs will really get you going; just check out their latest hit “They Preach, We Burn” and you’ll know what kind of elemental force you’re in for!

artists.name: Thormesis
artists.description: After their successful premiere in 2023, THORMESIS will be returning to Dinkelsbühl in 2026. THORMESIS play exactly the kind of music that so many of you love. Highly melodic (black) metal with post elements. And the guys from Rothenburg ob der Tauber are incredibly good at what they do! THORMESIS certainly don’t need to hide when compared to international acts – see for yourselves what this quartet has to offer when they take to the Campsite Circus Stage once again on Wednesday. You won’t regret it!

artists.name: Our Promise
artists.description: In recent years, OUR PROMISE’s development has only gone in one direction: upwards! The Swabians have recently gained a considerable fan base with their catchy metalcore, and their recent headlining tour was sold out in many places! It’s wonderful that hard, honest work is still appreciated by the fans. In 2026, OUR PROMISE will return to DKB and show you that the band’s current success is far from the end of the road!

artists.name: From Fall To Spring
artists.description: The German post-hardcore / melo-metalcore band FROM FALL TO SPRING are steadily climbing the career ladder and will be coming to Dinkelsbühl for the first time. Their melodic, modern metal sound is very catchy and should therefore be well received at SUMMER BREEZE. Post-hardcore fans should definitely put this band on their watch list!

artists.name: Alien Ant Farm
artists.description: ALIEN ANT FARM, founded in Riverside, California, in 1996, has sold over 5 million records worldwide! So it’s about time to invite the band to Dinkelsbühl. The American alternative rock band gained worldwide fame with their cover of Michael Jackson’s “Smooth Criminal.” ALIEN ANT FARM continues to thrill audiences with their mix of catchy rock and metal influences, which has shaped generations of fans. Don’t miss this band!

artists.name: Northlane
artists.description: Djent, heavy metalcore, soundscapes, electronics – NORTHLANE are coming to BREEZE! With their mix of progressive metal, djent, and catchy, almost pop-like choruses, these Australians from Sydney offer the ideal fare for all lovers of modern sounds. All the better that the band is finally making it back to Dinkelsbühl, so don’t miss out!

artists.name: Kim Dracula
artists.description: It is our pleasure to announce that KIM DRACULA will be at SUMMER BREEZE in summer 2026! The Australien trap metal phenomenon with its typical mixture of metal, hardcore, rap and pop has been on everyone’s lips for some time now, not least thanks to TikTok. At the few shows on the old continent, the band managed to sell out their shows in no time at all, so you shouldn’t miss the chance to party with KIM DRACULA on the big stage in Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: Imminence
artists.description: After scoring big at their last appearance in DKB, IMMINENCE 2026 want to go one better! And they will. Because the band is currently as hot as frying fat! IMMINECNE will have enough highlights in their program to convince even inexperienced fans of the quality of their post metalcore. So don’t miss them! From Sweden with love! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9tlu

artists.name: Saxon
artists.description: After the British heavy metal institution unfortunately had to cancel in 2025 due to health problems, 2026 is finally the year: SAXON will indeed be making their debut in Dinkelsbühl! The British band, which has been active since the 1970s, is undoubtedly one of the few constants in the heavy metal scene that has never disappointed its fans. Biff and Co. have countless classics to their credit, so you can expect a spectacular best-of fireworks display from these British veterans in Dinkelsbühl in August! Have fun! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6q

artists.name: Eisbrecher
artists.description: There’s no need to say much about the following confirmation, because EISBRECHER has been unavoidable for years! Like hardly any other band from Germany, these guys know how to weave hard riffs with electronic sounds to create absolutely catchy songs. EISBRECHER’s live performances in Dinkelsbühl clearly demonstrated that they are also great entertainers. After a four-year hiatus, the band is returning with new songs and will show you that they haven’t forgotten a thing during their absence. The signs point to a storm, because EISBRECHER are hot as hell!

artists.name: Amorphis
artists.description: They’re one of your favorite bands and will soon be releasing a new album, so it’s only logical that we had to bag AMORPHIS for 2026. With a new album and a new show under their belts, the Finnish melo-death heroes will once again be taking the stage in Dinkelsbühl, there’s no doubt about that. Look forward to Esa and co. presenting themselves from their best side again at BREEZE 2026!

artists.name: Dartagnan
artists.description: Let’s tell it like it is: we struggled for a long time before we signed dARTAGNAN for Dinkelsbühl. But a show in Stuttgart convinced us that the band is a perfect fit for the SUMMER BREEZE. The band’s musketeer rock will also entice the masses to sing, dance and party in Dinkelsbühl. Between all the banging, dARTAGNAN should provide just the right musical variety with their big show.

artists.name: Fulci
artists.description: The Italians FULCI have been stirring up the death metal underground for quite some time now, so it’s about time to sign this brutal band for SUMMER BREEZE! As the band name suggests, FULCI combine their two favorite hobbies: death metal and horror movies. With the blessing of the Fulci family, of course! Their brutal death metal is reminiscent of the glorious NYDM school as well as typical Tampa bands. Tasty fare for all death metal maniacs – now finally in Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: Massive Wagons
artists.description: WASSIVE WAGONS are like the rock jeans of bands: comfortable, robust, and always up for a good time. Their music makes you want to sing along as if your favorite band had started a party in your living room—and yet they are so British cool that it’s hard to believe they haven’t been in the music business for decades. Their songs are full of catchy melodies and a dash of humor that will make even the grumpiest person tap their feet. Sometimes it sounds as if they threw a guitar, a drum kit, and a dash of good vibes into a blender – and voilà, the perfect soundtrack for the end of the day is ready. In short: MASSIVE WAGONS get to the heart of rock so effortlessly that you automatically start swaying your hips when you hear them – whether you’re sitting in the office, chilling on the sofa, or standing in front of the stage in Dinkelsbühl.

artists.name: Grand Magus
artists.description: Isn’t it great? With GRAND MAGUS, you always know what you’re getting. Whether on record or on stage, the Swedes stand for straightforward, catchy, true heavy metal that simply sweeps away every lover of this music. Therefore we are particularly looking forward to finally seeing GRAND MAGUS again in Dinkelsbühl after a seven-year absence. It’s going to be great. Really great, in fact! Don’t miss it!

artists.name: Deserted Fear
artists.description: Joy, enthusiasm, and death metal. Do you know who we’re talking about? Of course! We’re talking about DESERTED FEAR! The friendliest and most cheerful death metal band ever is coming back to DKB after a seven-year hiatus. They’re bringing their new smasher album ‘Veins Of Fire’ with them, which shows the band at its best. But don’t worry, the guys know what you’re into, so they’ll be serving up a colorful potpourri of their work at BREEZE. Get excited! We certainly are…

artists.name: Trollfest
artists.description: The crazy Norwegians TROLLFEST will turn BREEZE 2026 upside down again, we’re sure of that. The combo’s party music will not only encourage you to dance and sing along, but also to drink and have fun. All musical styles are poked fun at here, but very skillfully, even their detractors must admit—and everything is presented in a very groovy and danceable way. Perfect for partying, in other words. But hey, when TROLLFEST brings an armada of pink flamingos onto the stage, they’ve won either way, right?!

artists.name: Fit For An Autopsy
artists.description: Deathcore alert again! FIT FOR AN AUTOPSY are coming to Dinkelsbühl in 2026. And the band is hot as hell. Hot, not only because they are in the form of their lives, no, they are also eager to finally blast their brutal yet catchy songs to the people of Dinkelsbühl again. So look forward to a great show and thick riffs that FIT FOR AN AUTOPSY will blast into your ears in August 2026!

artists.name: Mushroomhead
artists.description: Oh, wow. The following confirmation is actually visiting us for the first time in 2026: MUSHROOMHEAD! Founded in Cleveland in 1993, the nu metal band has built up a solid fan base with their crossover sound. MUSHROOMHEAD really gets the party started live, as you can see for yourselves in August ’26. Give the band a fitting welcome at their premiere in Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: Blackbraid
artists.description: Sgah’gahsowáh (Jon Krieger) has been shaking up the black metal underground since 2022 and now has a large fan base in Europe as well. Reason enough to invite BLACKBRAID to SUMMER BREEZE for the first time. BLACKBRAID are part of the growing indigenous black metal scene in the United States. Their albums combine conventional black metal with elements of traditional indigenous music, such as the Native American flute and acoustic interludes. The song material thus fluctuates between thrashing and melodic, even majestic elements. The perfect soundtrack for Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: Saor
artists.description: Ever since their debut album, we’ve had the following confirmation on our list, and now it’s finally happened: SAOR are coming to SUMMER BREEZE for the first time. According to their own description, the Scots play Caledonian black metal, which basically amounts to a melodic black/Celtic metal mix that comes across as incredibly epic. The ideal fare for all fans of beautiful melodies and heavy sounds. We can’t wait to see them live at BREEZE!

artists.name: Fireborn
artists.description: FIREBORN are traveling from southwestern Germany to celebrate their premiere with us in 2026. The band is known for their powerful and energetic music. Their style combines elements of metal and hard rock, which is reflected in melodic guitar riffs and catchy choruses. FIREBORN values emotionally charged songs, which often manage to create a rousing atmosphere through their use of melodic vocals and powerful instrumentation. Overall, their music is characterized by its dynamism and catchy melodies. A strong stage presence does the rest – so check out the band!

artists.name: Broken By The Scream
artists.description: Another premiere at SUMMER BREEZE 2026: The all-girl idol metal band BROKEN BY THE SCREAM is coming over from Japan! The girls recently completed a very successful concert tour through Europe and are now tackling the festivals. BROKEN BY THE SCREAM combines hard, aggressive metal elements with melodic passages, creating an intense sound. With a sound that combines various elements such as metalcore, prog, and djent, the band’s music has developed in a unique direction since their debut and is likely to cause a surprise or two in Dinkelsbühl.

artists.name: Stam1na
artists.description: The Finnish band STAM1NA has long been one of the biggest, best-known, and most respected bands in their homeland, but they are still relatively unknown abroad. It’s high time to change that. STAM1NA defines itself as technically sophisticated Finnish metal: groovy, thrashy guitars, complex riffs, and fast drumming, paired with deep growls and guttural screams. Melodies, dark atmospheres, socio-political lyrics – hard, energetic, idiosyncratic. That’s what STAM1NA stands for, and they will be making their first appearance in Dinkelsbühl in August. Don’t miss them – they have long been stars in their homeland!

artists.name: Rectal Smegma
artists.description: Okay, if you’re easily offended, you can skip to the next article—but metalheads who like it hard and heavy have something to look forward to: RECTAL SMEGMA are coming back to Dinkelsbühl in 2026. The Dutch gore grinders have always been a crowd pleaser at BREEZE, because their gore grind is all about having fun. A great party is guaranteed! The guys are already excited about their show at BREEZE, and we hope you are too! With that in mind: Grind on!

artists.name: Filth
artists.description: FILTH’s deathcore is incredibly heavy, dark, and fat, and they will be celebrating their premiere with us in 2026! The hip-hop-influenced deathcore of the Gutter Gang from North Carolina is insanely brutal and intense – the floor is sure to shake in the mosh pit in Dinkelsbühl! We are excited to witness FILTH and their extremely thick riffs in Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: Mittel Alta
artists.description: Sir Schwanzelot and Sir Gernhardt Reinlunzen are coming to BREEZE to treat you rabble to the finest medieval spoken word. MITTEL ALTA. Okay, we admit it, MITTEL ALTA is certainly not for the faint-hearted, but party animals will have a blast with this new band. Crude lyrics and even cruder beats are sure to transport all of you who are pain-free to party heaven! Join the tribe, enjoy the hype!

artists.name: Cryptopsy
artists.description: It’s hard to believe, but CRYPTOPSY have actually only been a guest at SUMMER BREEZE once before! All the better that it works out for 2026. The Canadian death metallers have been combining brutal death metal with technical gimmicks under the name CRYPTOPSY since 1992! And they continue to do so successfully! We look forward to presenting this legend to you in Dinkelsbühl in 2026. Don’t miss them!

artists.name: Groza
artists.description: With their 2024 album ‘Nadir’, GROZA have further strengthened their position in the German black metal scene. After the Bavarians have already laid Dinkelsbühl to ashes in 2023, we’re looking forward to another brutal show from the band in 2026, which no fan of melodic yet hard black metal should miss!

artists.name: Hindarfjäll
artists.description: We were able to secure a true gem at the last minute: HINDARFJÄLL is confirmed for august 2026! The swedish band is deeply rooted in its native culture and honors this through atmospheric compositions and poetic narratives. The band focuses on elements such as skaldic poetry, ethics, cosmology and traditional knowledge of nature. Musically grounded in traditional elements, along with captivating vocal harmonies and powerful rhythms, HINDARFJÄLL will cast their spell over the Wera Stage on Thursday night. Don’t miss this exciting and gripping band!

artists.name: Kllsignl
artists.description: Out Of Line presents at their matinee on Thursday: KLLSIGNL. The dark electro trap band from Munich combines dark beats and intense sounds with electronic elements that are not often heard at SUMMER BREEZE in this form. Check out this band!

artists.name: Serpents
artists.description: Electronically refined, modern metal is the specialty of SERPENTS from Poland. The band will make its Dinkelsbühl debut at the Out Of Line Matinee on Thursday and is sure to hit the spot with its hard-hitting songs that are perfect for dancing and headbanging. Check them out!

artists.name: I Am Your God
artists.description: There can never be enough melodic death bands playing at BREEZE, right? Right?! So it’s good that I AM YOUR GOD are returning to Dinkelsbühl after their last performance in 2023. The melodic death metal band already made a huge impression during their debut show – and in 2026, they want to take it up a notch! You can see for yourself whether they succeed at the Out Of Line Matinee on Thursday!

artists.name: Aesthetic Perfection
artists.description: Fancy some industrial? Industrial pop? Then we have just the right band for you: AESTHETIC PERFECTION. This group of musicians from Austria and the USA will really get you going with their danceable, driving beats. The band has enough live experience to turn Campsite Circus into a cauldron. Be there – at the Out Of Line Matinee on Thursday.

artists.name: Warfield
artists.description: WARFIELD will blast you with relentless thrash metal at their premiere in Dinkelsbühl. Founded in 2012, these gentlemen have dedicated themselves to good old thrash that is both fast-paced and extremely captivating and catchy. What WARFIELD has unleashed on the thrash community so far is truly first-class. If the songs have even half the impact live as they do on record, then nothing stands in the way of thrash overkill in Dinkelsbühl.

artists.name: Katerfahrt
artists.description: Alright, ready for some spiced pirate folk?! Then you know what’s coming next: KATERFAHRT! KATERFAHRT is an energetic pirate folk band that takes its audience on a musical journey across the high seas with its mix of sea shanties, folk, rousing melodies, and humorous lyrics. So, who’s up for it? And who always has the biggest one?! You know what I mean…

artists.name: Nanowar Of Steel
artists.description: From the smallest to the biggest stage at SUMMER BREEZE – not many bands manage that in such a short time. Welcome NANOWAR OF STEEL! The Italians are one of the few bands that have completely won you over from the very first second! With their crazy mix of metal and comedy, they have totally struck a chord with you. So, in 2026 on the big stage – NANOWAR OF STEEL and we want to see you celebrate like there’s no tomorrow! That’s an order!!!

artists.name: Das Lumpenpack
artists.description: Want to think outside the box? Sure thing! DAS LUMPENPACK will be joining us in 2026. DAS LUMPENPACK mainly performs German-language music with a distinct satirical cabaret influence. Their lyrics are socially critical and often humorous, while their music is a mix of punk and pop. Just the thing for open-minded people at SUMMER BREEZE.

artists.name: Future Palace
artists.description: FUTURE PALACE visited us for the first time in Dinkelbühl in 2024, and because the post-hardcore band’s show went down so well, they’ve decided to play another gig in 2026. With their super-melodic, catchy tunes, the Berliners should be able to delight us once again, so don’t miss this!

artists.name: Brothers Of Metal
artists.description: Mythology with a wink, power metal with incredibly catchy melodies – these are the trademarks of the BROTHERS OF METAL. The Swedes spread so much fun at their gigs that as a power metal fan you can’t help but join in the celebrations! So look forward to a big party with the band at SUMMER BREEZE 2026.

artists.name: The Butcher Sisters
artists.description: Holy moly, who still remembers the incredible party of THE BUTCHER SISTERS on the T-Stage in 2024?! Probably everyone who was there! And those who missed it are probably still kicking themselves today… But don’t be sad, because the BUTCHER SISTERS are coming back to us in 2026 to celebrate an even bigger party with all of you! Mark your calendars in bold and fat letters!!11!

artists.name: The Ghost Inside
artists.description: *Drum roll*: THE GHOST INSIDE are coming to Dinkelsbühl! Any questions? Not really, right?! For the metalcore community, the above sentence makes it clear that they can’t miss SUMMER BREEZE 2026, after all, THE GHOST INSIDE performances have been few and far between in recent years. Look forward to the guys from L.A. and give them a fantastic welcome at their premiere in Dinkelsbühl! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6m

artists.name: Lamb Of God
artists.description: One of the strongest bands of the so-called New Wave of American Heavy Metal is finally returning to SUMMER BREEZE! We are, of course, talking about LAMB OF GOD! Thirteen years after their last and only guest appearance in Dinkelsbühl, Randy Blythe and Co. are returning to SUMMER BREEZE to show you that they have become even stronger and more uncompromising in all that time. It’s going to be a party, because LAMB OF GOD are still among the best representatives of this genre! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6l

artists.name: Arch Enemy
artists.description: Hard work and unwavering perseverance always pay off! We can only confirm this, because the legendary ARCH ENEMY stand for exactly that! And best of all: we warmly welcome them to Dinkelsbühl in 2026! This international melodic death metal band is currently riding a wave of success after years of intense dedication and tireless effort. And they absolutely deserve it! Over the years, Mike Amott and the band have created countless iconic songs and set standards with their rousing shows. Now ARCH ENEMY are coming to Dinkelsbühl – in top form, with a packed program full of hits that will take your breath away! It’s not only going to be wild and thrilling, but also a real highlight that you shouldn’t miss! ARCH ENEMY introduce their new singer Lauren Hart with their new single ‘To The Last Breath’! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6i

artists.name: Versengold
artists.description: VERSENGOLD are here to stay. The band once took Dinkelbühl by storm, and the same will happen in 2026! Just remember their last performance, when the infield was bursting at the seams and the band and you had a great time together. Now it’s time to top that in 2026. The band will do everything they can, and we’re counting on your party mood, so that VERSENGOLD’s performance at SUMMER BREEZE 2026 will hopefully go down in the annals of the festival once again. You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6r

artists.name: Skindred
artists.description: During their last guest appearance in Dinkelbühl, they reduced the festival to rubble and ashes. In 2026, SKINDRED intend to take it up a notch! With their formidable and catchy crossover sound, the British band is sure to cause numerous mosh pits in Dinkelsbühl once again. If you’re into powerful grooves and heavy riffs, SKINDRED is the band for you, so check them out in August at SUMMER BREEZE 2026!

artists.name: Setyøursails
artists.description: SETYØURSAILS will be serving up modern and catchy metalcore in the summer of 2026. The Cologne-based band has been working continuously since their last guest appearance in Dinkelsbühl and has recently completed a well-deserved and very successful tour. SETYØURSAILS continues to be energetic and catchy, and singer Jules Mitch’s powerful voice is still an absolute ace up the band’s sleeve. Be sure to check out the band in Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: Brainstorm
artists.description: Solid, unshakeable and always of high quality – that’s how BRAINSTORM can be described. The German power metallers have been going their own way for years and have been convincing for decades with consistently high quality. In the studio as well as on stage. And so they are always a welcome guest at our festival – including in August 2026! Be there!

artists.name: Misery Index
artists.description: MISERY INDEX are back! The great thing about MISERY INDEX is undoubtedly that they managed early on to inspire both old school fans and young followers, so that several generations of death metal fans come together at their shows. This speaks for the quality of the quartet, which never sounds outdated despite the typical death metal elements in their sound. Or even too modern. With their razor-sharp riffs and extreme brutality, MISERY INDEX have successfully managed to bridge the gap between the past and the present. It’s going to be a party! A bloodbath!

artists.name: Speed
artists.description: A gang called SPEED is coming to SUMMER BREEZE 2026, and we couldn’t be happier! An absolute blast both live and on record, the first hardcore band with a transverse flute immediately played its way into our hearts. On their various support tours through Germany, they regularly outshone the headliners with lots of action on stage, a friendly demeanor, and powerful songs. Full marks for SPEED, and we’re sure they’ll be another big hit in Dinkelsbühl. Don’t miss them if you want to experience lots of action on and in front of the stage!

artists.name: Unprocessed
artists.description: Fans of modern, progressive metal love UNPROCESSED! “Enough with the fucking coffee party, this is a fucking rock show!” was the motto of the band’s last BREEZE performance, and you can expect more of the same in 2026! Despite all their high-class, technical escapades, UNPROCESSED never lose focus, giving the average fan the best of both worlds: total prog power and a big kick in the butt. Don’t miss the band’s performance. Don’t say we didn’t warn you…

artists.name: Deicide
artists.description: DEICIDE will honor us in 2026 and will open the gates to the depths of hell with their brutal and brute sound in Dinkelsbühl! The death metal troupe from Florida has always proclaimed a clear and unmistakable message. For years, DEICIDE have stood for viciousness in word and sound, which their legions of followers appreciate.

artists.name: Terror
artists.description: It’s going to be a party! TERROR are coming to Dinkelbühl and will once again reduce the stage to rubble. With their straightforward anthems and high-energy performance, we expect nothing less than a decent human goulash during their show, because where better to enjoy a hardcore show than in the middle of the mosh pit chaos?! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6x

artists.name: Der Weg Einer Freiheit
artists.description: A new album is close to its release, and in ’26, four years will have passed since their last gig in Dinkelsbühl – so it’s time to bring DER WEG EINER FREIHEIT back to the SUMMER BREEZE for another guest performance. Of course, the band was happy to accept our call, as they are aware of their good standing with the BREEZE audience. With new songs in store, the excitement for the gig should be considerable on both sides – needless to say, we are confident that DER WEG EINER FREIHEIT are also going to turn their 2026 show into a spectacle. Thus, and this applies to all extreme metal freaks: go there, witness!

artists.name: Deafheaven
artists.description: Finally! Finally the schedules of DEAFHEAVEN have coincided with the SUMMER BREEZE! Finally we were able to book this brilliant blackgaze band for our festival in Dinkelsbühl! Look forward to a demolition that hasn’t been seen at SUMMER BREEZE in this form for a long time. We are excited, the band’s excited – hopefully you are too! Fuck yeah!

artists.name: Wolves In The Throne Room
artists.description: Can you believe it? The following confirmation also gives its debut appearance in 2026! Hard to believe, but it will be the first WOLVES IN THE THRONE ROOM show in Dinkelsbühl. The band has existed since 2002 and has been releasing groundbreaking albums since their early days. But unfortunately, it never quite worked out for us to book them. Obviously, we are finally all more than proud to welcome the crew from Olympia. You can look forward to an impressive lesson in dark extreme metal – the band doesn’t like to be called Black Metal and also that would be much too short. Blackened Shoegaze fits quite well… Now you know what to do: go and mark WOLVES IN THE THRONE ROOM big and fat on your personal running orders!

artists.name: Zerre
artists.description: In your face old school thrash metal without compromise—that’s the specialty of ZERRE, who will be making their second guest appearance with us in 2026. The Würzburg band blasts through their set as if it were 1987! It all sounds like beer showers, mosh pits, and headbanging from start to finish. With a subtle hint of hardcore punk, ZERRE’s songs will transport you back to the glorious era when metal was still truly dangerous! Embark on a journey through time with ZERRE…

artists.name: Pridian
artists.description: Word is slowly spreading that the Baltic states have an excellent but still relatively unknown music scene. PRIDIAN from Estonia are working hard to gain the attention they have long deserved. This will also be the case in the summer of 2026 in Dinkelsbühl, when the Meralcore band will celebrate their debut at SUMMER BREEZE. Check out the band, they have a lot to offer!

artists.name: Luna Kills
artists.description: Fresh fodder from Finland for all modern metal fans: LUNA KILLS are coming to SUMMER BREEZE for the first time. The young band led by frontwoman Lotta has been active since 2019 and has released an extremely successful debut album, Deathmatch. Their hard yet catchy modern metal sound is both danceable and headbangable, so LUNA KILLS is likely to cover a wide range at SUMMER BREEZE. Be sure to check them out, this band has enormous potential!

artists.name: Brymir
artists.description: Man, has it really been seven years since BRYMIR last played in Dinkelsbühl? It seems like it… Well, we’ve remedied that situation and invited the band back for 2026. The melodic death metal band from Helsinki and Uusimaa will show you in August 2026 that even 17 years after the band was founded, they are still a force to be reckoned with!

artists.name: Erdling
artists.description: ERDLING, a band that has only performed once in Dinkelsbühl so far, will be making an appearance in 2026. The dark rockers from the Ore Mountains are known for their driving beats and catchy choruses that are guaranteed to get everyone singing along. If you feel like dancing and singing your heart out, then you should head to the ERDLING gig at SUMMER BREEZE in Dinkelsbühl.

artists.name: Blood Command
artists.description: Punk rock from Norway can’t be bad! BLOOD COMMAND also prove this. The band will convince at their premiere in Dinkelsbühl with an extremely agile show and a lot of fun in their cheeks. Let yourself be carried away by the band’s energy level when they tear up the stage at BREEZE in August 2026! Nuff said!

artists.name: Illdisposed
artists.description: Guys, time is running! It’s been nine years since ILLDISPOSED last played here! The Danish death metal steam hammer joins us in 2026 to show you that they are still a force to be reckoned with and that they haven’t forgotten anything. So far, their appearances at BREEZE have always been crowned with success, so we’re sure that summer 2026 will be no different!

artists.name: Ten56.
artists.description: Since frontman Aaron Matts (formerly of Betraying The Martyrs) made his debut with his new band TEN56. at SUMMER BREEZE in 2022, a lot has happened in the French camp. The metalcore band now has two albums and numerous singles under its belt and has become an established name on the scene. TEN56. will show you their current status quo in August 2026, so come and party with them!

artists.name: Bizarrekult
artists.description: In cooperation with the renowned Norwegian Inferno Metal Festival, we are delighted to present BIZARREKULT 2026 in Dinkelsbühl. In 2024, we launched a band exchange program aimed at strengthening musical ties between Germany and Norway. Within this framework, we have created opportunities for German bands to perform in Norway and, conversely, for Norwegian bands to showcase their talents in Germany. The Inferno Metal Festival has shown particular enthusiasm for the black metal band BIZARREKULT, who will be playing at both of our festivals this year. Immerse yourself in the dark worlds of BIZARREKULT—it’s worth it!

artists.name: Sun Eater
artists.description: What kind of sound do you expect from a band called SUN EATER? Exactly, the finest deathcore! And that’s exactly what this band from Frankfurt delivers! See for yourself at the Bloodblast Matinee on Friday, when SUN EATER will kick your ass with their brutal, wide-screen deathcore! Brutal, catchy, hard, majestic – SUN EATER!

artists.name: Avalanche Effect
artists.description: Modern metalcore sound from Münster – that’s what AVALANCHE EFFECT stands for. During Friday’s Bloodblast Matinee, the band will not only present their previously released singles, but also tracks from their brand new album ‘Letters To My Future Self’. Get ready for exciting, modern metalcore that’s just as sing-along-friendly as it is mosh pit-ready!

artists.name: Heaven.exe
artists.description: Berlin’s creative scene has given birth to a new child: HEAVEN.EXE. These modern metalheads have absorbed the creative diversity of their homeland with their mother’s milk and fuse hard, modern metal with the cold, industrial electro/techno sounds that are omnipresent in the city. The whole thing works wonderfully and is sure to create an extremely good atmosphere at its premiere in Dinkelsbühl. Catch them at the Bloodblas Matinee on Friday on the Campsite Stage!

artists.name: Minus Youth
artists.description: Wow, this is going to be awesome! MINUS YOUTH from Stuttgart are coming to Dinkelsbühl! As part of the Bloodblast Matinee, the Stuttgart band will be firing their absolutely awesome and brutal hardcore from the stage! Whether it’s maximum grooving or nice and upbeat, MINUS YOUTH are masters of their craft in every respect, so nothing stands in the way of a sweaty hardcore party at Campsite Circus!

artists.name: Perchta
artists.description: This extraordinary band comes from beautiful Tyrol and will be performing with us for the first time in 2026: PERCHTA. The Tyroleans combine local folklore with black metal sounds, performed in their native language. This combination undoubtedly has its own unique appeal, so anyone interested should check out this cool band on friday at the Campsite Circus Stage.

artists.name: Vulvarine
artists.description: The four power women of VULVARINE are coming to BREEZE for the first time in 2026! They bring their straightforward and down-to-earth rock, which drives you forward beautifully. No unnecessary baggage, no frills, just straight-up rock – that’s what VULVARINE are all about, and it works perfectly. Experience them live on the Campsite Stage in August 2026.

artists.name: Heavysaurus
artists.description: HEAVYSAURUS proved in 2019 and last year in Dinkelsbühl that they entertain not only children but also young-at-heart adults. Originally founded in Finland in 2009, the German offshoot of this dino metal band has been rocking the scene since 2017. HEAVYSAURUS’ goal: to introduce children to heavy metal and give adults a good time as well. And HEAVYSAURUS will easily succeed in doing so again with us, because we know you: you don’t shy away from a party. So have fun with Riffi Raffi and Co.! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6t

artists.name: Parasite Inc.
artists.description: PARASITE INC. – awesome melodic death metal from Swabia, not Sweden. The Swabians release great albums, just like a clockwork. At their last BREEZE performance, huge crowds of fans gathered in front of the main stage, but PARASITE INC. deserve more! That’s why they’ll prove in 2026 that they deserve that “more”! Support one of the best melodic death metal bands from Germany and party with the guys in Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: The Sons Of Huens
artists.description: They are the musical version of a wild circus with a penchant for chaos. THE SONS OF HUENS. The rock offshoot from Mehnersmoos recently debuted its first songs, which are bursting with irony and good vibes. THE SONS OF HUENS throw all conventions out the window—musical rules are for other bands! Get ready for a wild party with this band. And who knows, maybe THE SONS OF HUENS will have a surprise or two up their sleeves for you. We can’t wait to find out!

artists.name: Kadavar
artists.description: KADAVAR are finally coming back to Dinkelsbühl! The rockers last played here in 2018, so it’s long overdue! With their honest, gripping, handmade (hard) rock, these guys can hold their own anywhere, including Dinkelsbühl. Au contraire: in the SUMMER BREEZE universe, the band is actually a fantastic addition. We can be sure of an intense live performance! Attendance is mandatory for anyone who wants to sweeten their summer day with earthy rock ‘n’ roll.

artists.name: Orbit Culture
artists.description: Hell yes! ORBIT CULTURE are coming to Dinkelsbühl in 2026! The Swedes are known for their mix of groove and melodic death metal – the perfect recipe for another smash hit with you guys. Catchy songs that are bang-compatible, a dark mood, and every now and then you can even hear a slight thrash influence – all the ingredients are there for you to have a good time.

artists.name: Testament
artists.description: Thrash metal veterans TESTAMENT are an integral part of the scene and continue to demonstrate that Billy, Peterson, and company are still in top form. In 2026, the Californians will once again prove that the forefathers of Bay Area thrash are still more energetic and powerful than most of their colleagues. Get ready for a heavy dose of thrash metal at its finest, with plenty of classics in store – and as we all know, these guys have quite a few of those up their sleeves! Thrash ’til death! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6s

artists.name: Alestorm
artists.description: We don’t have to say much about the following party institution: ALESTORM are coming back to Dinkelsbühl! In the past, this band provided the very best party atmosphere at SUMMER BREEZE, and 2026 will be no different. The pirate metallers simply know how to do it. And you are undoubtedly an extremely grateful and above all CELEBRATIVE audience for it. A perfect match, so to speak… You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6u

artists.name: Helloween
artists.description: HELLOWEEN are currently celebrating their 40th anniversary and will be stopping off in Dinkelsbühl for a mammoth show in August 2026. The pumpkins have experienced a real upswing in recent years, so that they have already been able to announce several sold-out shows in the biggest venues for their current tour. At SUMMER BREEZE, you have the chance to celebrate the ultimate birthday party of the year with the well-rehearsed band, a spectacular production and a hit-filled, long set. Be there when HELLOWEEN celebrate THE most legendary birthday party ever in Dinkelsbühl! You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6d

artists.name: Thy Art Is Murder
artists.description: To all fans of good deathcore: THY ART IS MURDER are finally back at SUMMER BREEZE 2026! Since their formation in 2006, the Australians have been leaving a bloody trail of destruction through our seemingly perfect world. They have continued their rise with each subsequent album and are now established worldwide as deathcore giants. THY ART IS MURDER have a monopoly on sheer brutality, burning hatred, and the ability to channel all this musically flawlessly. Don’t miss the chance to experience this elemental force in front of the stage in Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: Soulbound
artists.description: Another debut at SUMMER BREEZE 2026: SOULBOUND. The band from Bielefeld has taken on a tasty mix of metal, industrial, gothic, NDH, and even metalcore elements that works very well. The whole thing is absolutely danceable, bangable, and singable. So it’s no surprise that SOULBOUND is climbing the ladder of success with great strides. Check out the band when they celebrate their premiere with us in August ’26!

artists.name: Sanguisugabogg
artists.description: Fancy some brutal rumbling death metal? Fancy a band with an illegible logo? Fancy a band with a tongue-twisting name? Then you’ve come to the right place! Hellcome: SANGUISUGABOGG! The guys are finally making it to SUMMER BREEZE! And we’re expecting a brutal show and a mosh pit goulash that’s been waiting to happen! Come and celebrate the brutality of death metal with SANGUISUGABOGG and us!

artists.name: Bloodred Hourglass
artists.description: BLOODRED HOURGLASS are coming to SUMMER BREEZE for the third time, and a lot has happened in the Finnish band’s camp since their last appearance in 2023. With tireless dedication, the Finnish melodic death metal band has won the hearts of fans and played countless live shows. BLOODRED HOURGLASS is sure to be in top form in Dinkelsbühl, ready to captivate you once again with their first-class, catchy, modern melodic death metal!

artists.name: Municipal Waste
artists.description: Lots of good vibes and plenty of mosh pits will be spreading our next confirmation in Dinkelsbühl: MUNICIPAL WASTE! The crossover kings from Richmond are known for riffing their way through thrash, punk, and hardcore history. That’s how it should be! The songs are simply fun and don’t let the listener stand or sit still, so MUNICIPAL WASTE can be sure to see a proper mosh pit goulash and numerous divers and headbanging heads from their stage.

artists.name: Thundermother
artists.description: Mama mia! Music with real balls, musically speaking, of course. THUNDERMOTHER from Sweden will rock your world. These ladies deliver hard rock ‘n’ roll that goes down better than gasoline in a motorcycle. The engine constantly roars and takes you kilometer after kilometer toward the sunset. And by sunset, we mean a whiskey bar. The louder you turn up THUNDERMOTHER, the lower the fuel taxes get; the closer you get to the stage, the louder the bass booms in your brain stem until you think Angus Young himself is jumping through your ear canal shouting “Freedom!” Don’t miss it!

artists.name: Decapitated
artists.description: It’s always a blast to attend a live show by the Polish band DECAPITATED, isn’t it? Well, this coming summer you’ll have another chance to do so when they rock the stage at SUMMER BREEZE 2026. And rock they will! Because DECAPITATED always kill it – whether with new or old songs. And that’s a fact!It’s always a blast to attend a live show by the Polish band DECAPITATED, isn’t it? Well, this coming summer you’ll have another chance to do so when they rock the stage at SUMMER BREEZE 2026. And rock they will! Because DECAPITATED always kill it – whether with new or old songs. And that’s a fact!

artists.name: Soulfly
artists.description: A whopping 19 (!) years after their premiere at SUMMER BREEZE, SOULFLY are finally coming back to us! Even almost 30 years after their formation, Max Cavalera’s groove metal band continues to raise the bar with their live performances. You can be sure that SOULFLY will tear BREEZE to shreds after this long absence! Don’t miss it!

artists.name: Paleface Swiss
artists.description: The masters of slamming beatdown are back! PALEFACE SWISS are our next confirmation! The Swiss are among the high flyers in beatdown – and rightly so! There’s no chocolate around their mouths here, just a good punch in the jaw! The band’s aggression level is immensely high, and they can translate that energy into their live performances, as you know from their last show with us. And so PALEFACE SWISS will once again leave scorched earth in Dinkelsbühl in 2026… You can find the merch here: https://emp.me/9t6h

artists.name: Soen
artists.description: Our next recommendation proves that catchiness and progressiveness are not mutually exclusive: SOEN. The band has devoted itself heart and soul to catchy prog metal, and it not only sounds good on paper, but also extremely formidable in real life. Music lovers will get their money’s worth with SOEN, because here catchiness AND musicality come together perfectly. So we recommend to all prog lovers and music nerds not to miss SOEN at their third performance in Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: Inner Space
artists.description: INNER SPACE slipped into the program literally at the last second, and we couldn’t be happier about it! The combo’s hateful hardcore kicks so hard – it’s a real joy. Brutality is the leading element here, and yet the songs are catchy as fuck at the same time! Guys, be sure to check out this band, because we’re expecting a total barrage in Dinkelsbühl! Hell yeah!

artists.name: Skeleton Pit
artists.description: Incoming: Old school thrash from Swabia! SKELETON PIT, a trio that has already successfully rocked Dinkelsbühl twice, is coming to SUMMER BREEZE 2026. They delivered what was ordered: old school thrash metal. Borrowed building blocks from scene icons such as Exodus and Testament, whipped up in their own mosh reactor and foamy, mangy headbanging riffs result in the extremely tasty SKELETON PIT brew: the recipe comes from San Francisco, with a dash of New York added, and then it’s brewed in Aalen. It will be tapped in Dinkelsbühl at the SUMMER BREEZE Open Air 2026! Fuck yeah!

artists.name: Wucan
artists.description: Although the band has been around since 2011, it has only recently started to take off. We are talking about WUCAN, our next confirmation. The Dresden-based combo regularly receives rave reviews in magazines, and more and more people are flocking to their shows. With their quirky mix of hard rock, 70s, Krautrock, and psychedelic, they are the odd one out in our program for 2026, but we are sure that WUCAN will win over open minds from start to finish! Check out the band!

artists.name: Haggefugg
artists.description: We know you’re always up for medieval party rock. Many representatives of this music genre who have already played in Dinkelsbühl have been mercilessly celebrated by you. This was also the case with HAGGEFUGG, who are calling you to the party again in 2026. That should fit like a glove again, so make sure you don’t miss HAGGEFUGG at their gig in Dinkelsbühl!

artists.name: Cabal
artists.description: Denmark is and remains a breeding ground for first-class bands. Our next confirmation also hails from there – we’re talking about CABAL. With ‘Everything Rots’, the deathcorelers recently released a fantastic album, so we simply HAD to invite CABAL for 2026. And the Danes will prove to you that they are definitely a force to be reckoned with. If you haven’t checked them out yet, you should do so as soon as possible!

artists.name: Manntra
artists.description: They’ve played their asses off, and in 2026 they’ll be showing off their skills in Dinkelsbühl: MANNTRA. Influenced by old Croatian folk music, this folk metal band will prove during their debut with us that constant touring really pays off. With their danceable, catchy songs, they’re sure to thrill you—we promise!

artists.name: 200 Stab Wounds
artists.description: Premiere at SUMMER BREEZE 2026: 200 STAB WOUNDS play in Dinkelsbühl for the first time! The death metallers from Cleveland are completely devoid of unnecessary frills and will give you a good thrashing with their brutal death metal. If you like rough growls and brutal riffing, you’ve come to the right place!

artists.name: Slomosa
artists.description: SLOMOSA deliver the finest desert rock from Norway, and we’ve been trying to sign them for years. Now it has finally worked out, and we are sure that the band from Bergen will go down very well with you with their driving and melodic songs. If you’re into groovy stoner rock/metal, you HAVE to see SLOMOSA in Dinkelsbühl. Add two to ten cold drinks and it’s a perfect evening!

artists.name: Møl
artists.description: Are you thirsty for great melodies and merciless riffs? Is blackgaze your favorite genre? Then get excited about MØL at SUMMER BREEZE 2026! The Danes have never been our guests before, so we are all the more delighted to be able to present this band to you in the summer of 2026. MØL’s music is often described as a fusion of hard riffs and dreamy sound structures, and thus as a bastardization of A Perfect Circle and Darkthrone. And in our opinion, that’s pretty much spot on! Our tip: Don’t miss it!

artists.name: Rodscha A. Kambodscha U. Tom Palme
artists.description: This year, we’ve booked another band for the rockers of tomorrow: RODSCHA FROM CAMBODIA AND TOM PALME. Rodscha and Tom are experts at putting on lively children’s concerts. They make children’s eyes light up and create unforgettable family experiences. Join them in a musical world full of fun, adventure, and creative expression. Rodscha and Tom’s songs are interactive and encourage movement. Their energetic performances, catchy rhythms, and inspiring lyrics delight children and parents alike—so don’t miss it. On Saturday, at the Campsite Circus Stage in Dinkelsbühl.

artists.name: Randale
artists.description: This year, we will once again celebrate the early musical education of our little rock stars! That’s why we have invited the wild bunch from RANDALE back to Dinkelsbühl – because who needs sleep when you can get kids excited about rock ‘n’ roll? “Der Hardrockhase Harald” will once again hop across the Campsite Circus stage as if he had rocket propulsion in his hind legs! And don’t worry, this year there will be endless catchy tunes; “Punkpanda Peter,” “Kommando Ampel”, “Futternapf Pogo” – you name it! Perfect for grooving and screaming along. To make sure the little headbangers have enough space to rock out, there’s an extra cordoned-off area in front of the stage – while the rest of the party crowd gets the monkey disco really going! So, on your marks, get set – and go!

artists.name: Plume
artists.description: PLUME are an interesting band: Based on pop, they fuse electronic sounds with modern metal, making the whole thing extremely catchy on the one hand, but also pretty loud on the other! If you’re up for this acoustic—and highly recommended—chaos of emotions, head to the Arising Empire Matinee at Campsite Circus on Saturday to find out more about PLUME.

artists.name: Blacktoothed
artists.description: Melodic hooklines, electronic elements, and heavy metalcore riffs – that’s what BLACKTOOTHED stands for. The trio from Leipzig will really get you going at the Arising Empire Matiness, after all, these guys have already gained quite a bit of live experience. Be there or be square!

artists.name: Hopsydian
artists.description: Another premiere: HOPSYDIAN are a pop-influenced metalcore band from Milan who combine sacred atmospheres with modern metalcore power, alt-metal edge, and post-hardcore urgency. Built on cinematic tension and explosive dynamics, their sound blends dark undertones with choruses that invite you to sing along. Experience them live at the Arising Empire Matinee on Saturday on the campsite stage.

artists.name: Lost In Hollywood
artists.description: Are you craving metalcore with alternative influences? Then we have something for you! LOST IN HOLLYWOOD are coming to SUMMER BREEZE. Don’t worry, their emotional metalcore has enough punch to really get the Campsite Circus rocking during the Arising Empire Matinee on Saturday. Don’t miss it!

artists.name: Phantom Corporation
artists.description: Yep, no compromises here! It’s going to be a blast: PHANTOM CORPORATION are coming to Dinkelsbühl for the first time. For years, these North Germans have been delivering first-class death crust that relentlessly pushes forward. And so PHANTOM CORPORATION will also turn the Campsite Circus stage upside down and ensure numerous hard mosh pits in Dinkelsühl. If you’re in the mood for an official death/crust/D-beat/punk/thrash shower, you’ve come to the right place!

artists.name: Hæresis
artists.description: We are delighted to welcome Berlin black metal band HÆRESIS to our party in August. Black metal fans can rejoice, as the band has a reputation for being a first-class live act. We are excited to see them perform, but HÆRESIS are already impressive on record. With their hard, varied, and at times epic-melodic black metal, they should be right up your alley. So be sure to add this band to your to-do list!

Seit gut zehn Jahren gibt es GHETTO JUSTICE nun schon, Zeit also, die Herrschaften mal nach Dinkelsbühl einzuladen. Mit dem Motto “Mehr Mosh, mehr Liebe, mehr Goodvibes, denn Böse gucken, Dogmas predigen und im Kollektiv abnicken – kann schließlich jeder.” fahren die Berliner im August gen Süden zu uns, um euch mit ihrem Hardcore ordentlich die Lauscher durchzublasen. Seid dabei, wenn die Party startet!

Erstmals besuchen uns die aufstrebenden deutschen Folk Rock-Vertreter DIE HABENICHTSE. Das Schmierentheater des Folk Rock – wie sie sich selbst bezeichnen – feiert ihre Premiere auf der Camspite Circus-Bühne und wird euch ordentlich zum Tanzen und Schwitzen bringen. Und: es wäre nicht die erste Band dieser Couleur, die sich an dieser Stelle die Basis zu einer steilen Karriere beim BREEZE legen würde. Wir sind gespannt!

Fast forward und hart-rockender Rock aus Mönchengladbach steht heute auf der Karte: MOTORJESUS kommen, um euch die Ohren lang zu ziehen. Wer auf bodenständige sowie schweißtreibende Rock ‘n‘ Roll-Shows steht, kommt an MOTORJESUS kaum vorbei. Die Burschen spielen grundehrlichen Hardrock, der direkt in den Bauch geht. Live entfaltet diese Musik besonders ihre Durchschlagskraft, so auch bei MOTORJESUS, die auf der Bühne mächtig Gas geben. Wer also Bock auf Entertainment der alten Schule hat, sollte sich MOTORJESUS vormerken.

Exakt zehn Jahre nach ihrer Auflösung sind sie für zweihandvoll Shows zurück: HACKNEYED! Etwas älter (und mancher auch haarloser und dicker ^^) aber motiviert bis in die Zehenspitzen werden die Aalener euch am Dienstag zeigen, dass Songs wie ‘Gut Candy’ oder ‘The Flaw Of Flesh’ locker den Test der Zeit überstanden haben und die (alten) Herren auch 2026 noch genaus durchschlagskräftig sind, wie jemals zuvor. Lasst euch diese Show – wie gesagt, einige der ganz wenigen – nicht entgehen, und feiert mi tuns HACKNEYED und ihr musikalisches Vermächtnis ab!

Bock auf Schlager-Grindcore mit viel Witz und wahnwitziger Show? Okay, euer Wunsch ist uns Befehl: welcome EXCREMENTORY GRINDFUCKERS! Sie haben auf dem SUMMER BREEZE schon einige erfolgreiche Shows absolviert, allerdings sind diese schon eine Weile her, so dass es an der Zeit war, die Fun-Grinder erneut einzuladen. Schnürt also eure Tanzschuhe und ölt eure Kehlen, denn die EXCREMENTORY GRINDFUCKERS werden wieder ein Mega-Fest in Dinkelsbühl abziehen, das ist jetzt schon sicher!

Sage und schreibe neun Jahre ist es bereits her, dass BETONTOD zuletzt bei uns zu Gast waren… 2026 ist es endlich wieder soweit, die Anti-Rockstars Brennen darauf, euch ihre Deutschrock-Songs um die Ohren zu hauen. Seid bereit für eine große Party mit dicken Mitgröl-Hymnen und einer schweisstreibenden Show. Im August 2026 in Dinkelsbühl…

AIRBOURNE werden im August Dinkelsbühls große Bühne erklimmen! Die pure Begeisterung, die die Australier hervorrufen sieht man beispielsweise auf einer ihrer Fanseiten: Mit den Worten „AIRBOURNE sind die wandelnde, sprechende, lebende, atmende, schreiende, spuckende Verkörperung all dessen, was Hard Rock seit seiner Entstehung beinhaltet hat. Spaß habend, reißend, hart feiernd und erfüllt von melodischer Gefahr sowie grinsendem Optimismus, schmieden AIRBOURNE Underdog-Hymnen mit nahezu waghalsiger Hingabe.“ Das lassen wir einfach so stehen! Merch gibt’s hier: https://emp.me/9t6w

Euch diese Band noch vorzustellen, hieße Bier in eine Kneipe zu tragen. Natürlich kennt und liebt ihr alle diese Schweden, die 2026 zum SUMMER BREEZE kommen: IN FLAMES! Anders und Co. haben sich natürlich längst in eure Herzen gespielt und nach ihrer letzten erfolgreichen Stippvisite in Dinkelsbühl mussten wir nicht lange überlegen, und haben IN FLAMES mit Kusshand für 2026 engagiert. Es scheint eine spezielle Bindung zwischen euch und der Band zu bestehen und mit jedem weiteren Auftritt IN FLAMES‘ beim SUMMER BREEZE scheint dieses Band stärker zu werden, die Show intensiver, die Party härter – so wie es sein sollte. Ihr werdet die Band auf Händen tragen, IN FLAMES werden es euch mit einer fetten Show und vielen geilen Hits danken. 100 Prozent! Merch gibt’s hier: https://emp.me/9t6e

Eure Lieblingsband HATEBREED kommt für einen weiteren Siegeszug nach Dinkelsbühl. Live sind die Amerikaner IMMER eine Bank und werden demnach auch völlig zurecht abgefeiert ohne Ende. Egal wie oft man HATEBREED gesehen hat – bei jeder Show fällt es einem schwer, still zu stehen. Und so werden Jamey und seine Jungs hoffentlich auch 2026 in Dinkelsbühl wieder alle Register ziehen und ihren Auftritt zu etwas Besonderem machen. Jamey freut sich auf euch, ihr euch hoffentlich auch auf ihn und seine Rasselbande.

Acht Jahre sind seit dem letzten Auftritt dieser Band in Dinkelbühl vergangen. Zeit also, ALCEST wieder zum SUMMER BREEZE zu holen. Und die Franzosen werden mit ihrem epischen Post Black Metal / Shoegaze alle dunklen Seelen in Dinkelsbühl zu verzaubern Wissen. Seit ihrer letzten Show bei uns haben sich ALCEST immens (weiter-) entwickelt, seit gespannt, auf ihre Show im August 2026!

Erneut wird das SUMMER BREEZE Open Air mit Pauken und Trompeten eingeläutet, denn noch bevor ihr euch in ein viertägiges hartmetallisches Paralleluniversum beamen könnt, heißt es: Bühne frei für die beliebte BLASMUSIK ILLENSCHWANG! Dass die fesche Truppe nicht nur gehörig Lokalkolorit versprüht, sondern für viele von euch ein wichtiger Bestandteil des Festivals geworden ist, erkennt man jedes Jahr an den Massen, die zum kompetenten Getute und Getröte der Damen und Herren ein Fass aufmachen. Und das ist auch gut so, untermauert dies doch den Fakt, dass die BLASMUSIK ILLENSCHWANG als bislang einzige Combo jedes Jahr zum Tanz bzw. Moshpit aufruft. So let’s get this party started oder – um beim Lokalkolorit zu bleiben: oans, zwoa gsuffa! PS: NEU! Die BLASMUSIK ist nun auch bei Facebook und Instagram! Lasst ihnen gerne ein Follow und Like da!

Old School Death Metal, gespielt von jungen Typen – das sind NECKBREAKKER aus Dänemark. Und die Band hat es in sich: Seit sie 2024 zuletzt bei uns zu Gast waren, haben NECKBREAKKER ein Album veröffentlicht, bei Nuclear Blast angedockt und mit Größen wie Slayer gespielt! Nicht schlecht für eine junge Band mit diesem Sound! Die Dänen arbeiten aktuell an neuem Material, also freut euch auf den neuen heissen Scheiss aus Dänemark, den wir euch bei der Nuclear Blast Labelnacht 2026präsentieren.

Nachdem ihr erster Auftritt im letzten Jahr ein durchschlagender Erfolg war, mussten wir die Essener von THE NARRATOR einfach nochmal verpflichten. Mit ihrem ausgefeilen Metal-/Hardcore dürften sie ein weiteres Mal exakt in‘s Schwarze treffen und am Mittwoch den Nuclear Blast Labelnacht mächtig aufmischen! Die Mischung aus harten Riffs und melodischen Passagen wird eine weitere musikalische Vollbedienung werden; seid bereit für eine Show voller Adrenalin!

Unlängst noch kurzfristig als Ersatz bei uns eingesprungen (danke nochmals!), 2026 endlich regulär im Programm: GREEN LUNG. GREEN LUNG verbindet in ihrer Musik Elemente des Doom und Heavy Metal mit einer atmosphärischen, oft psychedelischen Note. Ihre Songs zeichnen sich durch schwere Riffs, kraftvollen Gesang und eine düstere, mystische Stimmung aus. Dabei schaffen sie eine einzigartige Klanglandschaft, die sowohl retro als auch modern wirkt. Das kam bei letzten Auftritt in DKB super bei euch an, so das seiner weiteren erfolgreichen Show im Rahmen der Nuclear Blast Labelnacht nichts mehr im Wege stehen sollte.

Anfang der Neunziger ließ diese Band aufhorchen, da sie mit ihrem schweren, schleppenden aber durchaus melodiösen Death Metal einen großen Farbklecks im ansonsten von US-Death und Schweden-Gebolze dominierten Genre darstellte: PARADISE LOST. Heute, über 30 Jahre später, haben sich die Briten wieder ihrer Wurzeln besonnen, sprich schwere Düsternis, Growls, schleppende Riffs, melodische Gitarren und Doom regieren wieder bei PARADISE LOST. Die freut nicht nur die Old Schooler unter ihren Fans, denn auch das letzte Studioalbum ‘Obsidian‘ viel entsprechend aus, so dass auch frisch Reingeschmeckte mit dieser Ausrichtung glücklich werden. In Dinkelsbühl ziehen PARADISE LOST alle Register und spielen ein spezielles Programm für Euch. Die ein oder andere Überraschung ist hoffentlich dabei… Merch gibt’s hier: https://emp.me/9t6p

And now for something completely different: Taucht ein in die faszinierende nordische Klangwelt von EIVØR! Im Rahmen der Nuclear Blast Labelnacht wird diese außergewöhnliche Künstlerin erstmals in Dinkelsbühl auftreten und euch mit ihren folkloristischen Weisen in eine andere Welt befördern. Mystisch, packend, außergewöhnlich – all dies trifft auf das Schaffen von EIVØR zu. Lasst euch von ihr und der Band bezaubern!

Er gilt als seiner der erfolgreichsten irischen Indie Musiker: Gavin Dunne, Kreativkopf und Anführer von MIRACLE OF SOUND! Die von Videospielen, TV-Serien und Filmen beeinflußte Band hat sich vor allem in der Gaming-Szene einen Namen gemacht. Die Songs umfassen eine breite Palette von Genres und Stilen, von Dark Folk über Symphonic Metal bis hin zu Seemannsliedern, und haben in den letzten zehn Jahren ein breites und vielfältiges Publikum angezogen. Nun zum ersten Mal beim SUMMER BREEZE, laßt euch von der Magie und Vielfältigkeit MIRACLE OF SOUNDs begeistern!

Thrasher aufgepasst! Hier kommt ne töfte Truppe aus Dänemark zu uns zu Besuch: PERSECUTOR. Die Dänen kombinieren klassischen Thrash Metal mit tighten Arrangements, melodischen Harmonien und abwechslungsreichen Tempi. UND: sie sind live eine absolute Granate! Hier sind Moshpits vorprogrammiert. Mit einem charismatischen Frontmann gesegnet, wird euch diese Band in Grund und Boden zocken! Beware!

Bitte Leute! Bitte, bitte, bringt nächstes Jahr keine Fritteusen ob dieser Bestätigung zum BREEZE mit! Die KING NUGGET GANG kommt nämlich nach Dinkelsbühl! Sprich: Der August 2026 wird heiß, fett und unvergesslich, denn wenn diese Gang Dinkelsbühl unsicher macht, wird sich niemand den fett(ig)en Beats und Humor-Überdosis entziehen können! Ein neuer Stern am SB-Himmel, der in den kommenden Jahren überhell leuchten wird? Sehr wahrscheinlich, denn die KING NUGGET GANG hat die besten Voraussetzungen dafür, bei euch voll durchzustarten! PS: Dino Nuggets dürft ihr dennoch gerne im Booking-Büro abgeben ^^

Bock auf geilen Crossover Thrash mit metallischer Hardcore-Schlagseite? Dann sind INHUMAN NATURE genau das Richtige für euch! Die Briten brezeln auf ihrem aktuellen Album ‘Greater Than Death’ durch die Gegend, dass es eine wahre Freude. Ungestüm, catchy, absolut Party-tauglich und Moshpit-kompatibel – ihre Premiere in Dinkelsbühl kann nu rein Erfolg werden. Checkt diese geile Truppe aus, wir sind ganz begeistert!

Diese Neubestätigung sitzt musikalisch zwischen allen Stühlen, und gerade das macht sie so einzigartig und aufregend. Wir reden über URNE aus London. Ihre Mischung aus Stoner, Sludge, Metalcore, Doom, Death und Grunge ist outstanding – wie wir Schwaben sagen, ähem. Falls ihr Bock auf eine Band abseits der Norm habt, solltet ihr euch URNE beim Riot Of The Underground geben! Beim BREEZE 2022 waren sie eine der Gewinnerbands und es ist gut möglich, dass sie dies 2026 wiederholen. Das wollt ihr doch nicht verpassen, oder?!

CASTLE RAT sind eine Heavy-Doom-Band aus Brooklyn, die sich musikalisch im weitesten Sinn auf den Spuren von Black Sabbath bewegt. 2026 sind sie im Rahmen des Riot Of The Underground zum ersten Mal zu Gast bei uns. Mit ihrer Mittelalter-Fantasy-Ästhetik sowie ihrer rohen Energie und eingängige Melodien sollte die Band ein leichtes Spiel bei euch haben. Lasst euch in Dinkelsbühl in die Wunderwelt von CASTLE RAT entführen!

Durch ein Wechselbad der Gefühle wird euch unsere nächste Bestätigung schicken: CÂN BARDD. Die Schweizer zelebrieren bekanntlich atmosphärischen Black Metal, der zahlreiche, vom Folk beeinflusste, Elemente beinhaltet. Kalt und warm, harsch und super-melodiös sozusagen. Diese Mischung geht perfekt auf, wie ihr im August 2026 in Dinkelsbühl im Rahmen des Riot Of The Undeground erleben könnt! Be there!

Gegründet Ende 2022 in Djursland, Dänemark, sorgen 802 mit ihrer einzigartigen und mitreißenden Mischung aus Heavy Metal-Distortion, gespenstischen Synthesizern und eingängigen Hooks mit progressiven Drumbeats für Aufsehen. Die Musik des Trios ist bang- und tanzbar und furchtbar eingängig. Die Diskrepanz zwischen typischem, metallischem Aussehen (inkl. Nieten und Co.) und zuckersüßen Melodien in Verbindung mit groovigen Beats ziehen einen sofort in den Bann. Glaubt uns, wir haben die Band schon livehaftig erlebt. Checkt 802 unbedingt im Rahmen des Riot Of The Underground ab – dankt uns später!

Wem bei den Stichwörtern Boss-HM2, Death Metal und Hardcore Punk warm um’s Herz wird, der sollte sich BORN HANGED aus Karlsruhe vormerken! Denn hier ist der Titel wahrlich Programm: ‘Ultimate Savagery’ heißt die neue EP der Badenser und die Herren machen mit ihrem räudigen Bastard aus Death Metal und Hardcore den PERFEKTEN Soundtrack für rasante Moshpit-Action.
